vocab.example: Let's have a short feedback session at the end of the sprint.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy có một buổi trao đổi phản hồi ngắn vào cuối sprint.

vocab.example: Team morale was low after the busy release week.
vocab.example_vi: Tinh thần đội nhóm thấp sau tuần phát hành bận rộn.

vocab.example: The workload this sprint was too heavy for the team.
vocab.example_vi: Khối lượng công việc sprint này quá nặng với đội.

vocab.example: We need a better balance between speed and quality.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta cần cân bằng tốt hơn giữa tốc độ và chất lượng.

vocab.meaning_vi: ăn mừng, ghi nhận thành tích
vocab.example: Let's celebrate finishing this difficult sprint.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy ăn mừng vì đã hoàn thành sprint khó khăn này.

vocab.example: We should find the root problem, not just the symptom.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta nên tìm vấn đề gốc rễ, không chỉ triệu chứng.

vocab.example: Collaboration between design and dev was great this sprint.
vocab.example_vi: Sự hợp tác giữa thiết kế và lập trình rất tốt trong sprint này.

vocab.example: Let's commit to fixing this process next sprint.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy cam kết sửa quy trình này trong sprint tới.

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: This sprint was tough. Let's start our feedback session.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Agreed. Team morale was a bit low after the busy release week.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: I think the workload this sprint was too heavy for us.

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: That's fair. We need a better balance between speed and quality.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: On the positive side, collaboration between design and dev was great.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: True. Let's celebrate that, even with the difficult sprint.

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: Good point. Now, what's the root problem behind the heavy workload?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: I think we accepted too many tasks without checking capacity.

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: Let's commit to planning capacity more carefully next sprint.

questions.q: How was team morale this sprint?
What went well according to Hoa?
What is the root problem the team identifies?
options: Accepting too many tasks without checking capacity

shadowing: This sprint was tough, so let's start our feedback session right away.
Team morale was a bit low after the busy release week.
We need a better balance between speed and quality on this project.
Collaboration between design and dev was great this sprint, honestly.
Let's commit to planning capacity more carefully next sprint, starting Monday.
